title: Process of Inference Using a Full Joint Distribution
description: This flowchart illustrates the step-by-step logical process of deriving a probability for a query proposition given some evidence, using the full joint probability distribution as the knowledge base.
relationships: Process starts by defining the query and evidence
Leads to identification of all variables involved in the model
Uses the full joint distribution as a lookup table for probabilities
Marginalization sums probabilities for all possible worlds consistent with the evidence
Normalization ensures probabilities sum to 1 for the resulting distribution
Final computed probability for the query is the output
